title: rosa × laevigata
intro: Rosa × laevigata, also known as the Chinese rose or pink dog rose, is a hybrid rose species that combines the characteristics of Rosa chinensis and Rosa laevigata. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × laevigata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
